paths.name: custom-viz
paths.message: Please use only type-only imports from 'custom-viz'.

patterns.message: We should avoid importing `metabase/` code in the component tests, we might accidentally include CLJS in the dependencies and that can create issues. Component tests should only use the code it needs to test, which is in the package.

paths.name: @emotion/styled
paths.message: Please style components using css modules.

paths.name: @emotion/react
paths.message: Please use components from `metabase/ui` instead and style them using css modules.

paths.name: custom-viz

patterns.message: Please name your test setup and utils files with a ".spec.*" in the filename, or put them under "/tests", e.g. "setup.spec.ts", "MyComponent.setup.spec.ts", or "tests/setup.ts". This is to ensure they won't be imported in the SDK build.

Please name your test setup and utils files with a ".spec.*" in the filename, or put them under "/tests", e.g. "setup.spec.ts", "MyComponent.setup.spec.ts", or "tests/setup.ts". This is to ensure they won't be imported in the SDK build.
Keep imports in auth-common to a minimum as it is used in embed.js for iframe embedding.
